reviews.comment:
Paso obligado para cuando uno llega o se va, salvo que vaya a caballo o en bicicleta !!!! :)

(Translated by Google)
A must-see when arriving or departing, unless you're on horseback or by bicycle! :)

reviews.comment:
Es un lugar hermoso ,tranquilo , familiar , con buena gente voy de tres a cuatro veces al año sin importar q haga frío o calor ya sea en temporada o no xq es lindo todo el año..

(Translated by Google)
It's a beautiful, peaceful, family-friendly place with good people. I go three or four times a year, regardless of whether it's cold or hot, whether it's the season or not, because it's lovely all year round.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBeEthTGdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre hay que esperar mucho tiempo. Poco personal, pocos surtidores. Buena predisposición de los playeros.

(Translated by Google)
There's always a long wait. Not enough staff, not enough pumps. The attendants are helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRcmFmS3JRRRAB
